summary: Backend testing completed for TeacherHubPro AI endpoints after P0 bug fix. All 14 tests passed. The AI Network Error bug has been successfully fixed by updating the model name from 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929' to 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514'.
passed_tests: Authentication - Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Lesson Plans - List plans endpoint works
Lesson Plans - Create and delete plan CRUD operations work
AI Generation - Lesson plan generation works (P0 FIX VERIFIED)
AI Chat - Single message chat works
AI Chat - Multi-turn conversation works with history
AI Templates - Starter templates endpoint works
AI Templates - Weekly template endpoint works
AI Generations - User generations history endpoint works
seed_data_creation: Created test lesson plan during CRUD testing (automatically cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 AI Network Error bug has been fixed and verified. Model updated from 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929' to 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514' in /app/backend/routes/ai.py. All AI endpoints working: /api/ai/generate (lesson_plan, quiz, summary), /api/ai/chat, /api/ai/chat/history/{session_id}, /api/ai/templates/starters, /api/ai/templates/weekly, /api/ai/generations. Test user has active trial period for AI access.
